nasb.text: Thus they are to keep charge of the tent of meeting, and charge of the holy place, and charge of the sons of Aaron their relatives, for the service of the house of the Lord.

esv.text: Thus they were to keep charge of the tent of meeting and the sanctuary, and to attend the sons of Aaron, their brothers, for the service of the house of the Lord.

cnv.text: 他們要看守會幕和聖所，以及看管他們在耶和華殿裡辦事的親族，亞倫的子孫。

ccb.text: 并负责看守会幕和圣所，帮助他们的亲族——亚伦的子孙在耶和华的殿里供职。
